notes: Updated the songs workspace to use a warmer muted palette and quieter material treatment aligned with the design rule engine.
Compressed the page header so the working surface remains dominant over framing copy.
Strengthened list selection hierarchy and score metadata grouping while preserving the existing local data model.
Reduced corner radii and removed pill-heavy treatments so the workspace reads as more restrained and editorial, not soft SaaS.
Replaced several nested card treatments with divider-led grouping so the surface feels flatter and more controlled.
Refined the header and empty detail state using browser capture evidence so the first view feels intentional rather than oversized or unfinished.
open_issues: The MVP still relies on static local song data, so asynchronous loading and fetch error states are not yet implemented.
No screenshot capture was added to the supervisor flow, so design review evidence remains code-based.
